_doc: Chapter 1 Office Street signage text. Single source of truth for the player-readable sign props placed in scenes/world/routes/office_street.tscn during the 2026-05-18 Pixellab sprints (PigSwineSign, NoticeBoard, CourtSignpost, StreetNameOfficeStreet, StreetNameCounselRow). Schema: signs[] of { id, _anchor, lines, lines_unlocked?, _gate_flag? }. Read by scripts/actors/sign.gd via sign_id binding; lines dispatch through the existing dialogue box on E. English-first per feedback_pig_swine_english_first_signage.md; tone register adjacent to dialogue_samples.txt §Sign and notice text samples (Asia-adjacent dry flavor over institutional surfaces). Every line passes Taste Standard 5/5: real referent (community kiosk-board / institutional plate / wayfinding sign), alive (specific texture), clear (player understands what the sign is), future-proof (no chapter-specific lore that would break at later chapter rereads).
_owner: Design (text) + Code (sign.gd dispatch). Per AGENTS.md §Stack invariants, no player-facing strings live in .tscn or .gd; this file is the authoritative source.

signs._doc: Hangs over the front door of Pig & Swine. The 'possibly open' undercut is the firm's institutional voice — uncertain even about itself. Two short declaratives.

Community notice board, three pinned items deep. Each line is a single pinned slip, written in the institutional surface voice of a Warsaw kiosk-board. Three short notices: a missing-pet flyer with a legal pun, a building-works notice with the half-attempt at compliance that Polish institutional signage actually has, and a tenants' meeting notice that has been indefinitely postponed.
lines: (A community notice board, three pinned items deep.)
• 'CAT MISSING. ANSWERS TO MOTION TO DISMISS.'
• 'BUILDING WORKS, FLOOR 4. ENTRANCE STILL TECHNICALLY ALLOWED.'

signs._doc: Wayfinding signpost at the branch point. Pre-readiness: bare directional. Post-readiness (gated on chapter1.court_unlocked): adds the ironic helpful note. The unlocked variant uses chapter1.court_unlocked as the gate; sign.gd evaluates this against State.data and picks the right lines.
lines_unlocked: Open today. Try not to be late.

signs._doc: Street-name plate. Plain institutional surface. The plate itself carries the joke (it's named 'Office Street' because that is what the firm calls the firm's street).
Street-name plate at the branch east. Plain. The legal-quarter institutional voice is in the name, not the line.
